Miami → Mérida Centro — Premium 3‑Day Itinerary

Curated for high-value travelers — estimated budget: $2,600–3,900

Summary

A premium 3‑day itinerary: arrival, private archaeology & cenote experience, boutique relaxation, and return.

Day 1 — Arrival & Chill

  • Fly Miami → Mérida (morning)
  • Check in: Mérida Centro Signature Hotel — search / book: Booking.com — Mérida Centro
  • Afternoon: private Centro Histórico walking tour
  • Dinner: fine‑dining Yucatecan experience

Day 2 — Culture & Cenotes

  • Morning: private Chichén Itzá early‑access tour — book examples: GetYourGuide
  • Afternoon: curated cenote swim + private transfer
  • Evening: rooftop cocktails in Centro

Day 3 — Relax & Return

  • Morning: boutique spa & breakfast
  • Late morning: Paseo de Montejo shopping
  • Afternoon: transfer to airport, fly Mérida → Miami

Booking

  • Hotels: Booking.com — Mérida Centro
  • Flights: example search (affiliate): Expedia
  • Experiences: GetYourGuide — Mérida
